TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_MuntenŤíôÁĒį, title = MuntenŤíôÁĒį, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/MuntenŤíôÁĒį} }

S.FORM: ayda a demiad u Fa-kuo cesiaciw ci Munten (Michel de Montaigne)a nipilecuhan nida.cinida u Fa-kuo wenifusin sakaetiman a zenwencui nu misulitay a tademaw, nipisulitan nida mahida u paceba hananay a mibulesak nu sulitan a waywayan, nidatu a nidatengan ku nisulitan cinidaan, nika udipan nida a wayway atu nidatengan nida ku sasasulitan. (Michel de Montaigne)ÁöĄÁĒüśó•. . ci Munten caay henay patideng tu hicanan a nakamuan, caay palutatengan cinida tu idaw ku nipabelian ititaan tu lemed hananay, nakamuan nida mahida masasungaliway, sisa cinida hantu taneng malacesiaciw haw? saan sa cinida mahida ci Sisayluo (Ť•ŅŚ°ěÁĺÖCicero) mahiniay a cesiaciw u satabakiay a maapaay, widahan misuayaw cinida tu palutatengaan nida tu cancanan u maapaay a tatapangan kuyni sa. sakamusa cinida, sakaudip numita amalawit ku lipahak nu apa sa, duma satu u tineng nu tangah, anu cacaya a tademawan maudip idaw ku nipibabelih amidateng, cinida hantu caay pipaculi tu nidatengan a nikaudip. šĽĖŤ™™, . nisulitan ni Munten "kilul sanana anisulitan ťö®Á≠ÜťõÜ"(Essais)i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu walu a bataan (1580) a mihcaan malatusa kunipatahekalan tu cudad nida. nikadan satu katukuh i patay nida tu sabaw tusa a mihcaan, sawsawni micunus cinida tu tusaay a nisulitan tu sasakamuen, sakikuday mahedek nida ku sakatulu a nisulitan tu cudad, pulung han nu cudad makaala tu cacay a malebut ku babelihan. ci Munten caay pisengal micunus tu nisulitan nida, nika caay henay piwada cinida tu nisulitan nida tu labu, pa'teng sa patinaku tu ninanaman tu tusaay a bataan tunika sumadan nida. mahiniay anisulitan bingkiwen mahicaay kiya asipen, u Igu Amilika anipibenisan uhicaay hakiya ku tatengaay a miasip, ni datengan nida a "cesiasesin Śď≤Ś≠łśÄĚśÉ≥"cudad caay kaw mahicaay. anu pacumuden i cesia a likisian, nida a sakaypabaliwan nu cudad misuayaw ci Dika-e atu ci Pa'se-ka (ŚłēśĖĮŚć°Blaise Pscal) samikawa' sa, u nakamuan nida mikawa' i takuwan, nabalucuan tu sengtuy cuyi, cence'cesia u nakamuan. (Blaise Pascal) . anu ci Munten u cesiacia, unisulidan nida tu sakaudip u sapalutatengaan anibabelihan ni datengan, nika tanektekan mabulesak a nisulitan i tidatida tu caay henay celak: ahican ku tademaw maudip sa? caay kita pabaliw, cida hantu i sabaw tu enem a secian u palutatengaan a "sakaudip a cesiaciw ". cacaya a malebut lima a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku lulu (1533) mihcaan nu ayda, ci Munten i Fakuo nutipan timulan a luma(Ch√Ęteau de Montaigne)nilecuhan. siidaay ku luma' nu heni, aenengan nuheni a luma' ni cakayan nu baki nida naw pacakaya tu buting a nikasikalisiwan ku sapicakay tina lumaan. 1533 (Ch√Ęteau de Montaigne)ŚáļÁĒü. . wama nida ci Falan-suose ise' namalepacaw satu mala siidaay a tademaw, namala siciw tu nu Puoe-duo . . wama nida pabalucu papinanam ci Munten nan tu latingu, katukuh tu enemay a mihcaan kya minanam tu Fawen. sisa ci Munten adidi' henay matineng tu micuda tu Wicie Á∂≠ŚźČÁąĺ, Awwide Ś•ßÁ∂≠Śĺ∑ atu Helase Ť≥ÄśčČśĖĮ a latingu a cudadan. micudad cinida tu Puoe-duo singanganay a cacudadan Ciyena cacudadan (Coll√®ge de Guyenne), idaw kumusakamuay cinidaan natayda i Tuluce micudad tunu hulic. (Coll√®ge de Guyenne), . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: ajda a d…ômiad u fa-kuo ¶…ôsia ¶iw ¶i munt…ôn (mi ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺ d…ô montaign…ô)a nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nida. ¶inida u fa-kuo w…ônifusin saka…ôtiman a z…ônw…ôn ¶ui nu misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw, nipisur~…ĺitan nida mańßida u pa ¶…ôba ńßananaj a mibur~…ĺ…ôsak nu sur~…ĺitan a wajwajan, nidatu a nidat…ôŇčan ku nisur~…ĺitan ¶inidaan, nika udipan nida a wajwaj atu nidat…ôŇčan nida ku sasasur~…ĺitan. (mi ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺ d…ô montaign…ô)***. . ¶i munt…ôn ¶aaj ńß…ônaj patid…ôŇč tu ńßi ¶anan a nakamuan, ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ¶inida tu idaw ku nipab…ôr~…ĺian ititaan tu r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd ńßananaj, nakamuan nida mańßida masasuŇčar~…ĺiwaj, sisa ¶inida ńßantu tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ¶…ôsia ¶iw ńßaw? saan sa ¶inida mańßida ¶i sisajr~…ĺuo (*** ¶i ¶…ôro) mańßiniaj a ¶…ôsia ¶iw u satabakiaj a maapaaj, widańßan misuajaw ¶inida tu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nida tu ¶an ¶anan u maapaaj a tatapaŇčan kujni sa. sakamusa ¶inida, sakaudip numita amar~…ĺawit ku r~…ĺipańßak nu apa sa, duma satu u tin…ôŇč nu taŇčańß, anu ¶a ¶aja a tad…ômawan maudip idaw ku nipibab…ôr~…ĺińß amidat…ôŇč, ¶inida ńßantu ¶aaj pipa ¶ur~…ĺi tu nidat…ôŇčan a nikaudip. **, . nisur~…ĺitan ni munt…ôn "kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sanana anisur~…ĺitan ***"(…ôssais)i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺatusa kunipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu ¶udad nida. nikadan satu katukuńß i pataj nida tu sabaw tusa a mińß ¶aan, sawsawni mi ¶unus ¶inida tu tusaaj a nisur~…ĺitan tu sasakamu…ôn, sakikudaj mańß…ôd…ôk nida ku sakatur~…ĺu a nisur~…ĺitan tu ¶udad, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan nu ¶udad makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku bab…ôr~…ĺińßan. ¶i munt…ôn ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ mi ¶unus tu nisur~…ĺitan nida, nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj piwada ¶inida tu nisur~…ĺitan nida tu r~…ĺabu, pa Ē~ °t…ôŇč sa patinaku tu ninanaman tu tusaaj a bataan tunika sumadan nida. mańßiniaj anisur~…ĺitan biŇčkiw…ôn mańßi ¶aaj kija asip…ôn, u igu amir~…ĺika anipib…ônisan uńßi ¶aaj ńßakija ku tat…ôŇčaaj a miasip, ni dat…ôŇčan nida a " ¶…ôsias…ôsin ****" ¶udad ¶aaj kaw mańßi ¶aaj. anu pa ¶umud…ôn i ¶…ôsia a r~…ĺikisian, nida a sakajpabar~…ĺiwan nu ¶udad misuajaw ¶i dika-…ô atu ¶i pa Ē~ °s…ô-ka (***br~…ĺais…ô ps ¶ar~…ĺ) samikawa Ē~ ° sa, u nakamuan nida mikawa Ē~ ° i takuwan, nabar~…ĺu ¶uan tu s…ôŇčtuj ¶uji, ¶…ôn ¶…ô Ē~ ° ¶…ôsia u nakamuan. (br~…ĺais…ô pas ¶ar~…ĺ) . anu ¶i munt…ôn u ¶…ôsia ¶ia, unisur~…ĺidan nida tu sakaudip u sapar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan anibab…ôr~…ĺińßan ni dat…ôŇčan, nika tan…ôkt…ôkan mabur~…ĺ…ôsak a nisur~…ĺitan i tidatida tu ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ¶…ôr~…ĺak: ańßi ¶an ku tad…ômaw maudip sa? ¶aaj kita pabar~…ĺiw, ¶ida ńßantu i sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a s…ô ¶ian u par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a "sakaudip a ¶…ôsia ¶iw ". ¶a ¶aja a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺur~…ĺu (****) mińß ¶aan nu ajda, ¶i munt…ôn i fakuo nutipan timur~…ĺan a r~…ĺuma( ¶ńß*t…ôau d…ô montaign…ô)nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. siidaaj ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni, a…ôn…ôŇčan nuńß…ôni a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni ¶akajan nu baki nida naw pa ¶akaja tu butiŇč a nikasikar~…ĺisiwan ku sapi ¶akaj tina r~…ĺumaan. **** ( ¶ńß*t…ôau d…ô montaign…ô)**. . wama nida ¶i far~…ĺan-suos…ô is…ô Ē~ ° namar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw satu mar~…ĺa siidaaj a tad…ômaw, namar~…ĺa si ¶iw tu nu puo…ô-duo . . wama nida pabar~…ĺu ¶u papinanam ¶i munt…ôn nan tu r~…ĺatiŇču, katukuńß tu …ôn…ômaj a mińß ¶aan kja minanam tu faw…ôn. sisa ¶i munt…ôn adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj matin…ôŇč tu mi ¶uda tu wi ¶i…ô ***, awwid…ô *** atu ńß…ôr~…ĺas…ô *** a r~…ĺatiŇču a ¶udadan. mi ¶udad ¶inida tu puo…ô-duo siŇčaŇčanaj a ¶a ¶udadan ¶ij…ôna ¶a ¶udadan ( ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ*g…ô d…ô guj…ônn…ô), idaw kumusakamuaj ¶inidaan natajda i tur~…ĺu ¶…ô mi ¶udad tunu ńßur~…ĺi ¶. ( ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ*g…ô d…ô guj…ônn…ô), . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: ayda a demiad u Fa-kuo cesiaciw ci Munten (Michel de Montaigne)a nipilecuhan nida.cinida u Fa-kuo wenifusin sakaetiman a zenwencui nu misulitay a tademaw, nipisulitan nida mahida u paceba hananay a mibulesak nu sulitan a waywayan, nidatu a nidatengan ku nisulitan cinidaan, nika udipan nida a wayway atu nidatengan nida ku sasasulitan. (Michel de Montaigne)ÁöĄÁĒüśó•. . ci Munten caay henay patideng tu hicanan a nakamuan, caay palutatengan cinida tu idaw ku nipabelian ititaan tu lemed hananay, nakamuan nida mahida masasungaliway, sisa cinida hantu taneng malacesiaciw haw? saan sa cinida mahida ci Sisayluo (Ť•ŅŚ°ěÁĺÖCicero) mahiniay a cesiaciw u satabakiay a maapaay, widahan misuayaw cinida tu palutatengaan nida tu cancanan u maapaay a tatapangan kuyni sa. sakamusa cinida, sakaudip numita amalawit ku lipahak nu apa sa, duma satu u tineng nu tangah, anu cacaya a tademawan maudip idaw ku nipibabelih amidateng, cinida hantu caay pipaculi tu nidatengan a nikaudip. šĽĖŤ™™, . nisulitan ni Munten "kilul sanana anisulitan ťö®Á≠ÜťõÜ"(Essais)i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu walu a bataan (1580) a mihcaan malatusa kunipatahekalan tu cudad nida. nikadan satu katukuh i patay nida tu sabaw tusa a mihcaan, sawsawni micunus cinida tu tusaay a nisulitan tu sasakamuen, sakikuday mahedek nida ku sakatulu a nisulitan tu cudad, pulung han nu cudad makaala tu cacay a malebut ku babelihan. ci Munten caay pisengal micunus tu nisulitan nida, nika caay henay piwada cinida tu nisulitan nida tu labu, pa'teng sa patinaku tu ninanaman tu tusaay a bataan tunika sumadan nida. mahiniay anisulitan bingkiwen mahicaay kiya asipen, u Igu Amilika anipibenisan uhicaay hakiya ku tatengaay a miasip, ni datengan nida a "cesiasesin Śď≤Ś≠łśÄĚśÉ≥"cudad caay kaw mahicaay. anu pacumuden i cesia a likisian, nida a sakaypabaliwan nu cudad misuayaw ci Dika-e atu ci Pa'se-ka (ŚłēśĖĮŚć°Blaise Pscal) samikawa' sa, u nakamuan nida mikawa' i takuwan, nabalucuan tu sengtuy cuyi, cence'cesia u nakamuan. (Blaise Pascal) . anu ci Munten u cesiacia, unisulidan nida tu sakaudip u sapalutatengaan anibabelihan ni datengan, nika tanektekan mabulesak a nisulitan i tidatida tu caay henay celak: ahican ku tademaw maudip sa? caay kita pabaliw, cida hantu i sabaw tu enem a secian u palutatengaan a "sakaudip a cesiaciw ". cacaya a malebut lima a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku lulu (1533) mihcaan nu ayda, ci Munten i Fakuo nutipan timulan a luma(Ch√Ęteau de Montaigne)nilecuhan. siidaay ku luma' nu heni, aenengan nuheni a luma' ni cakayan nu baki nida naw pacakaya tu buting a nikasikalisiwan ku sapicakay tina lumaan. 1533 (Ch√Ęteau de Montaigne)ŚáļÁĒü. . wama nida ci Falan-suose ise' namalepacaw satu mala siidaay a tademaw, namala siciw tu nu Puoe-duo . . wama nida pabalucu papinanam ci Munten nan tu latingu, katukuh tu enemay a mihcaan kya minanam tu Fawen. sisa ci Munten adidi' henay matineng tu micuda tu Wicie Á∂≠ŚźČÁąĺ, Awwide Ś•ßÁ∂≠Śĺ∑ atu Helase Ť≥ÄśčČśĖĮ a latingu a cudadan. micudad cinida tu Puoe-duo singanganay a cacudadan Ciyena cacudadan (Coll√®ge de Guyenne), idaw kumusakamuay cinidaan natayda i Tuluce micudad tunu hulic. (Coll√®ge de Guyenne), . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: ajda a d…ômiad u fa-kuo ¶…ôsia ¶iw ¶i munt…ôn (mi ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺ d…ô montaign…ô)a nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nida. ¶inida u fa-kuo w…ônifusin saka…ôtiman a z…ônw…ôn ¶ui nu misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw, nipisur~…ĺitan nida mańßida u pa ¶…ôba ńßananaj a mibur~…ĺ…ôsak nu sur~…ĺitan a wajwajan, nidatu a nidat…ôŇčan ku nisur~…ĺitan ¶inidaan, nika udipan nida a wajwaj atu nidat…ôŇčan nida ku sasasur~…ĺitan. (mi ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺ d…ô montaign…ô)***. . ¶i munt…ôn ¶aaj ńß…ônaj patid…ôŇč tu ńßi ¶anan a nakamuan, ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ¶inida tu idaw ku nipab…ôr~…ĺian ititaan tu r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd ńßananaj, nakamuan nida mańßida masasuŇčar~…ĺiwaj, sisa ¶inida ńßantu tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ¶…ôsia ¶iw ńßaw? saan sa ¶inida mańßida ¶i sisajr~…ĺuo (*** ¶i ¶…ôro) mańßiniaj a ¶…ôsia ¶iw u satabakiaj a maapaaj, widańßan misuajaw ¶inida tu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nida tu ¶an ¶anan u maapaaj a tatapaŇčan kujni sa. sakamusa ¶inida, sakaudip numita amar~…ĺawit ku r~…ĺipańßak nu apa sa, duma satu u tin…ôŇč nu taŇčańß, anu ¶a ¶aja a tad…ômawan maudip idaw ku nipibab…ôr~…ĺińß amidat…ôŇč, ¶inida ńßantu ¶aaj pipa ¶ur~…ĺi tu nidat…ôŇčan a nikaudip. **, . nisur~…ĺitan ni munt…ôn "kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sanana anisur~…ĺitan ***"(…ôssais)i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺatusa kunipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu ¶udad nida. nikadan satu katukuńß i pataj nida tu sabaw tusa a mińß ¶aan, sawsawni mi ¶unus ¶inida tu tusaaj a nisur~…ĺitan tu sasakamu…ôn, sakikudaj mańß…ôd…ôk nida ku sakatur~…ĺu a nisur~…ĺitan tu ¶udad, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan nu ¶udad makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku bab…ôr~…ĺińßan. ¶i munt…ôn ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ mi ¶unus tu nisur~…ĺitan nida, nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj piwada ¶inida tu nisur~…ĺitan nida tu r~…ĺabu, pa Ē~ °t…ôŇč sa patinaku tu ninanaman tu tusaaj a bataan tunika sumadan nida. mańßiniaj anisur~…ĺitan biŇčkiw…ôn mańßi ¶aaj kija asip…ôn, u igu amir~…ĺika anipib…ônisan uńßi ¶aaj ńßakija ku tat…ôŇčaaj a miasip, ni dat…ôŇčan nida a " ¶…ôsias…ôsin ****" ¶udad ¶aaj kaw mańßi ¶aaj. anu pa ¶umud…ôn i ¶…ôsia a r~…ĺikisian, nida a sakajpabar~…ĺiwan nu ¶udad misuajaw ¶i dika-…ô atu ¶i pa Ē~ °s…ô-ka (***br~…ĺais…ô ps ¶ar~…ĺ) samikawa Ē~ ° sa, u nakamuan nida mikawa Ē~ ° i takuwan, nabar~…ĺu ¶uan tu s…ôŇčtuj ¶uji, ¶…ôn ¶…ô Ē~ ° ¶…ôsia u nakamuan. (br~…ĺais…ô pas ¶ar~…ĺ) . anu ¶i munt…ôn u ¶…ôsia ¶ia, unisur~…ĺidan nida tu sakaudip u sapar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan anibab…ôr~…ĺińßan ni dat…ôŇčan, nika tan…ôkt…ôkan mabur~…ĺ…ôsak a nisur~…ĺitan i tidatida tu ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ¶…ôr~…ĺak: ańßi ¶an ku tad…ômaw maudip sa? ¶aaj kita pabar~…ĺiw, ¶ida ńßantu i sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a s…ô ¶ian u par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a "sakaudip a ¶…ôsia ¶iw ". ¶a ¶aja a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺur~…ĺu (****) mińß ¶aan nu ajda, ¶i munt…ôn i fakuo nutipan timur~…ĺan a r~…ĺuma( ¶ńß*t…ôau d…ô montaign…ô)nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. siidaaj ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni, a…ôn…ôŇčan nuńß…ôni a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni ¶akajan nu baki nida naw pa ¶akaja tu butiŇč a nikasikar~…ĺisiwan ku sapi ¶akaj tina r~…ĺumaan. **** ( ¶ńß*t…ôau d…ô montaign…ô)**. . wama nida ¶i far~…ĺan-suos…ô is…ô Ē~ ° namar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw satu mar~…ĺa siidaaj a tad…ômaw, namar~…ĺa si ¶iw tu nu puo…ô-duo . . wama nida pabar~…ĺu ¶u papinanam ¶i munt…ôn nan tu r~…ĺatiŇču, katukuńß tu …ôn…ômaj a mińß ¶aan kja minanam tu faw…ôn. sisa ¶i munt…ôn adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj matin…ôŇč tu mi ¶uda tu wi ¶i…ô ***, awwid…ô *** atu ńß…ôr~…ĺas…ô *** a r~…ĺatiŇču a ¶udadan. mi ¶udad ¶inida tu puo…ô-duo siŇčaŇčanaj a ¶a ¶udadan ¶ij…ôna ¶a ¶udadan ( ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ*g…ô d…ô guj…ônn…ô), idaw kumusakamuaj ¶inidaan natajda i tur~…ĺu ¶…ô mi ¶udad tunu ńßur~…ĺi ¶. ( ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ*g…ô d…ô guj…ônn…ô), . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
